g.title: Expresses (pinyin has hanzi): Māmā wǒ zhǎng dàle → 妈妈 我长大了
Expresses (pinyin has hanzi): Māmā wǒ zhǎng dàle → 妈妈 我长大了
Expresses (pinyin has english): Māmā wǒ zhǎng dàle → Mama, I grew up
Expresses (pinyin has english): Māmā wǒ zhǎng dàle → Mama, I grew up
Expresses (pinyin has english): Māmā wǒ zhǎng dàle → Mom, I grew up.
Expresses (pinyin has english): Māmā wǒ zhǎng dàle → Mom, I grew up.
Expresses (pinyin has english): Wúshù shīwàng wú kě jì wàng → Countless disappointments, no hope
Expresses (pinyin has english): Wúshù shīwàng wú kě jì wàng → Countless disappointments, no hope
Expresses (pinyin has english): bù zài hàipà fāxiàn wǒ yě zài zhè → no longer afraid to discover that I'm here too.
Expresses (pinyin has english): bù zài hàipà fāxiàn wǒ yě zài zhè → no longer afraid to discover that I'm here too.
Expresses (pinyin has english): bù zài kěqiú wǒ de yǒngbào → no longer longing for your hugs
Expresses (pinyin has english): bù zài kěqiú wǒ de yǒngbào → no longer longing for your hugs
Expresses (pinyin has english): bù zài xūyào wǒ de rènkě → no longer needing your approval
Expresses (pinyin has english): bù zài xūyào wǒ de rènkě → no longer needing your approval

g.text: 不再填补 所有空白
不再害怕 信任坏掉
不再害怕 发现我也在这
不再指责 不再指责
不再指责 无果的爱
不再渴求 我的拥抱
不再渴求 被人围绕
不再难过 所有离开
不再需要 太多微笑
不再需要 我的认可
因为我害怕 真的害怕
害怕不被喜欢 不被接受
希望落空 掉进心里的黑洞
无数失望 无可寄望
有些话不知该怎么说呀
没有东西 可以抓住
